mapper.sql: id, title, note, ndate, img, uid, username, favcount, zan, address
mapper.insert:
insert into wct_blog
id,
title,
note,
ndate,
img,
uid,
username,
favcount,
zan,
address,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{uid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{favcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{zan,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update wct_blog
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ndate = #{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img = #{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
uid = #{uid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
favcount = #{favcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
zan = #{zan,jdbcType=INTEGER},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update wct_blog set title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ndate = #{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, img = #{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uid = #{uid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, favcount = #{favcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, zan = #{zan,jdbcType=INTEGER}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
